rdf:Description.dc:description: Normalised indicator hierarchy at the deepest scour stage (S/D=0.58), manuscript §5 Table 4. Grouped log-scale bar chart for eight monitoring indicators — Frequency, Stiffness, Damping, Bottom strain, Displacement, Settlement rate, Asymmetry index, Composite SDI — comparing T4 (dense sat.) and T5 (loose sat.). The T5/T4 ratio is annotated above each pair. Key observation: displacement ×51.8, asymmetry index ×113, while frequency only ×3.0 — frequency alone is the weakest early-warning signal for the bending-to-tilting transition.
